evals.prompt: Run defect analysis for Jira issue BCIN-9000. The issue type resolves to Issue. Use the defects-analysis skill. Phase 0 must delegate to single-defect-analysis for issue-class inputs.
evals.expected_output: Phase 0 emits SPAWN_MANIFEST, orchestrator spawns single-defect-analysis, phase0 --post writes delegated_run.json and prints DELEGATED_RUN. No reporter-local phases run.

evals.prompt: Run defect analysis for Jira issue BCIN-5809. The issue type resolves to Feature. Use the defects-analysis skill. Phase 0 must keep the run in reporter-local scope without blocking for manual approval.
evals.expected_output: Phase 0 classifies route as reporter_scope_single_key. Phases 1-5 run. No delegation. No Confluence publish. Final Feishu notification.

evals.prompt: Run defect analysis for release version 26.03. Prior runs have mixed states: FINAL_EXISTS for some features, DRAFT_EXISTS for others, CONTEXT_ONLY and FRESH for the rest. Verify automatic default plan selection per feature_state_matrix.
evals.expected_output: Phase 1 expands release into feature keys. Per-feature default actions: use_existing, resume, generate_from_cache, proceed. No manual approval prompt.
expectations: context/feature_state_matrix.json has per-feature report_state and default_action

evals.prompt: Run defect analysis for JQL query 'project = BCIN AND issuetype = Defect'. The query returns defects with PR links. Verify phase4 spawn/post behavior and final Feishu notification.
evals.expected_output: Phase 4 emits SPAWN_MANIFEST for PR analysis. Orchestrator spawns subagents. Phase 4 --post consolidates pr_impact_summary.json. Phase 5 generates report, self-review loop exits with pass, Feishu sent.
expectations: Phase 4 emits SPAWN_MANIFEST when pr_links.json has entries
Phase 5 orchestrator generates draft report and invokes report-quality-reviewer

evals.prompt: Verify self-review + finalize loop: when report-quality-reviewer returns fail (missing section), auto-fix applies, draft regenerated, re-review until pass. Loop exits with pass before finalization and Feishu.
evals.expected_output: Phase 5 loop: generate draft -> review -> if fail, auto-fix and retry (max 3). Exit gate: review result pass. Only then promote to final and send Feishu.
expectations: Phase 5 orchestrator directly generates draft report
Loop exits when review result is pass
FEISHU_NOTIFY or notification_pending only after pass
